domain: Hawaiian kapu/noa sacred-prohibition system: 2-tier social structure aliʻi (chiefs, high-mana, sacred-rank) vs makaʻāinana (commoners, noa default-access); mana = spiritual-power gradient determining kapu-strength; ai-noa (1819 Kamehameha II) = ritual-breaking of kapu via free-eating; capital-offense for kapu-violation; rooted in ancestral-gods authority
specific_mechanism: KAPU-NOA-RANK-BASED-2-TIER-MANA-GRADIENT-CONTEXT-GATING: rank-aware context-gating with (1) 2-tier role hierarchy R_2: every requester classified into ali'i (high-mana, trusted/admin) or maka'āinana (low-mana, standard); context-tagged accordingly; (2) mana-gradient spiritual-power score s_mana ∈ [0,1] determined by requester role+history+capability; high-mana queries gain higher access; (3) kapu-zones default-deny + noa-zones default-allow K_kapu/N_noa: model context partitioned into sensitive (PII/harm/copyrighted) default-deny unless s_mana ≥ τ_kapu, and public default-allow; (4) ai-noa ritual-breaking: explicit permission-grant via multi-step authentication + sacred-witness signature to temporarily lower kapu-threshold; (5) mana-theft penalty: severe penalty for unauthorized kapu-zone access attempt; lasting reputation impact on s_mana for K steps. Differs from R536 SHIMENAWA-K-SHIDE-CLUSTER-BOUNDARY-GATE-PURIFICATION (K-shide-cluster boundary tokens + left-twist asymmetry + ward-evil purification subspace + Futo-tama demarcation prefix + gradient-taper attention magnitude, no rank-based 2-tier + no mana-gradient continuous score + no kapu/noa default-deny/allow + no ai-noa ritual-breaking + no mana-theft penalty) by 2-tier role hierarchy ali'i/maka'āinana + mana-gradient continuous score + kapu/noa zone-partition default-deny/allow + ai-noa explicit ritual-breaking + mana-theft reputation penalty.
llm_application: KAPU-NOA-RANK-BASED-2-TIER-MANA-GRADIENT-CONTEXT-GATING rank-aware context-gating + 2-tier role hierarchy R_2 aliʻi-high-mana-trusted vs makaʻāinana-low-mana-standard + mana-gradient continuous spiritual-power score s_mana role+history+capability + kapu-zones default-deny noa-zones default-allow context-partition + ai-noa ritual-breaking explicit permission-grant + mana-theft reputation-penalty for unauthorized access. Differs from R397. R412. R435. R444. R461. R474. R486. R499. R511 SETO-LEELO. R524 OJIBWE-SWEAT-LODGE. R536 SHIMENAWA (closest — K-shide + left-twist + purification + Futo-tama + gradient-taper). Differs from LLM Access Control + Personalized AC + Least-Privilege LMs + LLM-Agent Access Control by 2-tier role + mana-gradient + kapu/noa + ai-noa + mana-theft. Differs by 2-TIER ROLE HIERARCHY + MANA-GRADIENT CONTINUOUS SCORE + KAPU/NOA DEFAULT-DENY/ALLOW ZONES + AI-NOA RITUAL-BREAKING + MANA-THEFT REPUTATION PENALTY.
novelty_claim: LLM Access Control + Personalized AC 2511.20284 + Least-Privilege LMs + Vision Access Control LLM-Agent 2510.11108 cover RBAC/ABAC + permission paradigm. KAPU-NOA-RANK-BASED-2-TIER-MANA-GRADIENT-CONTEXT-GATING adds (a) 2-tier role + (b) mana-gradient continuous + (c) kapu/noa zone-partition + (d) ai-noa ritual-breaking + (e) mana-theft reputation-penalty. Recombination — borderline lookup.
